outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran's top diplomat in Russia for Putin meeting as US peace talks stall; Iran sends new Hormuz proposal
outlets.summary: CNN leads with diplomatic isolation narrative — Araghchi in St. Petersburg for Putin meeting. Iran's new proposal to reopen Hormuz while delaying nuclear talks could be a breakthrough. Trump plans Situation Room meeting Monday. Israel-UAE Iron Dome deployment revealed.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Trump is facing an increasingly patient Iran as oil prices spike and peace talks stall
outlets.summary: NBC frames Iran as outlasting US pressure — analytical lens suggesting Tehran's patience strategy may be working. Oil spike to $107.97 underscores economic costs of stalemate. Iran's new proposal positions Tehran as reasonable party.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump tells Fox News Iran can call US if it wants to negotiate; White House rejects latest Iranian offer
outlets.summary: Fox News frames Trump as holding firm — 'they can call us.' Emphasizes US strength and Iran's desperation in sending proposal. Hegseth: blockade 'as long as it takes.' King Charles visit as show of allied solidarity.

outlets.name: Daily Wire
outlets.headline: Israel secretly deployed Iron Dome to UAE — first foreign deployment
outlets.summary: Right-leaning outlets emphasize Israel-UAE military cooperation as vindication of Abraham Accords legacy. Iron Dome success story. Bennett-Lapid alliance seen as political threat to Netanyahu.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Araghchi to meet Putin; Trump says Tehran can call for talks; new Hormuz proposal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera presents dual narrative — Araghchi diplomatic tour vs. Trump's dismissive 'they can call.' Covers Iran's new Hormuz proposal alongside Lebanon ceasefire deterioration. Emphasis on humanitarian costs: 2,509 killed in Lebanon.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: King Charles arrives in Washington for state visit as Iran war dominates agenda
outlets.summary: BBC frames King Charles visit through prism of UK-US relations strained by Iran war. 29 MPs called for cancellation. Trump-Starmer Hormuz call signals UK-France initiative on freedom of navigation.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Iran said to offer US deal to reopen Hormuz and end war, delay talks on nuclear program
outlets.summary: Times of Israel leads with Iran's Hormuz proposal. Also covers Iron Dome UAE revelation, Bennett-Lapid 'Together' alliance, and continued Lebanon ceasefire deterioration. Diplomatic angle dominant.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Report: Israel sent Iron Dome battery, troops to help defend UAE during Iran war
outlets.summary: Haaretz emphasizes the unprecedented Israel-Gulf military cooperation. Analysis frames this as new era of Middle East security architecture. Concern about provoking further Iranian escalation against Gulf states.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran's foreign minister meets President Putin in St. Petersburg — war consultations continue
outlets.summary: Press TV frames Araghchi-Putin meeting as strategic partnership deepening. Iran's proposal positions Tehran as peace-seeking party vs. US aggression. Emphasizes Iran resumed commercial flights as sign of resilience. Pezeshkian rejects 'forced negotiations.'

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran proposes Hormuz reopening — nuclear program talks to follow in separate track
outlets.summary: Iranian media frames the new proposal as Iran taking the initiative for peace while US remains bellicose. Blockade framed as the primary obstacle. Commercial flight resumption highlighted as victory narrative.
